tools.name: ctx_cargo_outdated
tools.description: Check for outdated Rust crate dependencies.
tools.command: cargo outdated 2>/dev/null || echo 'cargo-outdated not installed. Install with: cargo install cargo-outdated'

tools.name: ctx_cargo_audit
tools.description: Audit Rust dependencies for known security vulnerabilities.

tools.name: ctx_cargo_tree
tools.description: Show the dependency tree for the current Rust project (depth 1).
